---
title: Download Button
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/inputs/download-button/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/inputs/download-button/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 200
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.download_button
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.download_button.html
    signature: ui.download_button(id, label, *, icon=None, width=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.download_link
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.download_link.html
    signature: ui.download_link(id, label, *, icon=None, width=None, **kwargs)
  - title: '@render.download_button'
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/render/render.download_button.html
    signature: '@render.download_button(fn=None, *, filename=None, media_type=None, encoding="utf-8", label="Download", width=None)'
  - title: '@render.download_link'
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/render/render.download_link.html
    signature: '@render.download_link(fn=None, *, filename=None, media_type=None, encoding="utf-8", label="Download")'
- id: kitchen-sink
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-kitchen-sink.ejs
  contents:
  - title: Download Button
    core: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#h=0&-1g6GWsjmVNJ2ysBqgsi4xGQwONpryXEcyB9rD96HesDWhgdk2CrG1utI9W8nuO5DiXFYB2jOr1rAAjBtmVBgXAZnNna73VrM3GGoR-anHAc0QAGRvof526lS7rBYEMOJU2ladJyYPEJShCMTJ1eqo+v1u8gTru9DOx+OJk0QSWdyap9MxrNokny7f5wvFzX7qu1v1uMiSQiL7bziD+ZqtLBcOKPF2ybwHOhQJCRRDBkAGQnQXDLJCxCyAAbu2j5JPax6Rr0PZ9kQKSDhksgjmOiFYUaSYzr68jIMQxgLDI35YsgUAQDhizLHRxwMFwiaFARUaXmu05bieyS7nMK5ZgAzEeAndCyZ4HKUTFwBkFartWHaSUkNG-gcwIUBAQHGMQxCFLaD4oZ2CxLHABwwO8oRKJCJroCgTatgA3BJJ7IVKnnbAG9ZzNmzYAKTuUh1IUpIEVWBqcAQRAziOM4siGLB4YMTFcjJWqSjoHyRDsjlFBEElWJcOQZKIFsAACehpQwWAiVWCZ8RByzQPA--wUGA00ALpAA
    express: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#h=0&--mhAAs80ccpdi8fxyApOkmToiJYkSqua4yS2M7yTKxAWDsMheTonImHIuz7JyNwMFwzbaHtTR6QeGmTHB2msB2aVtDNdkQ8ZUCDhsWxlF9cCZOZ3bwwjyCvT5lwwhQECBRYxBkVShBLTsex5VsMBAg4ShIgW6AoAuS4ANw46mCVrklJhmKlLXtIe5BZWeuX5det5VFsNP7KwFWiNVtVxH+UUxYyjVwGBIOsDN7WjTMK09ah-VYQtI248t409VGG0EAArDtw1LabWxZBqEDLAQmKu4tECEKguzoAgKBgFQagUGAP4ALpAA
    image: thumbnail.png  # TODO: release-docs - add thumbnail.png screenshot for download-button
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A download button triggers a file download when clicked. Use `ui.download_button()` for a button style, or `ui.download_link()` for a link style.

To add a download button to your app:

1. Add `ui.download_button()` or `ui.download_link()` to the UI with a unique `id` and descriptive `label`. (In Express mode, the button is auto-generated from the function name.)

2. Create a function with the same name as the button's `id` and decorate it with `@render.download_button()` (or `@render.download_link()` when pairing with `ui.download_link()`).

3. The download function can either:
   - Return a string filepath (for existing files on disk)
   - `yield` content line by line or chunk by chunk (for generated content or temp files)

4. Specify the download filename using the `filename` parameter of `@render.download_button()`. This can be a string or a function that returns a string (useful for dynamic filenames).

**Dynamic Filenames**: Use a lambda or function for the `filename` parameter to create dynamic filenames:

```python
@render.download_button(filename=lambda: f"data-{date.today()}.csv")
```

**Content Types**: The download handler can yield any content - CSV data, JSON, text files, images, or binary data. For binary files, yield bytes instead of strings.

**Streaming**: The `yield` approach allows streaming large files efficiently without loading the entire file into memory.

See Also: [Download Link](../download-link/index.qmd) for the link-styled counterpart of this component, and [Output UI](../../outputs/ui/index.qmd) which can be used to dynamically generate download buttons based on user inputs or reactive values.
